heading: Correction of administrative errors
label: 1454 Correction of administrative errors
notes: Amendments1996— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The Secretary concerned may, under regulations prescribed under , correct or revoke any election under this subchapter when he considers it necessary to correct an administrative error. Except when procured by fraud, a correction or revocation under this section is final and conclusive on all officers of the United States.”Pub. L. 104–201section 1455 of this title1989— substituted “errors” for “deficiencies” in section catchline.Pub. L. 101–189
